title: Log Cabin +
description: Build the Cabin of your dreams!
body:
Build the cabin of your dreams! (With Round Logs! and not the default square ones)

Features
- Round logs of every wood type, including Crimson and Warped types.
- Thin log walls of every wood type.
- Simple glass and wood door.
- Oak wood trimmed window.

Crafting
- All of the round logs are made in the stonecutter with a single non-stripped log.
- All log wall types are made in the stonecutter with a single round log.

Installing
- First Download and install the latest version of Forge Mod Loader.
- Download the mod file.
- Open and extract the zip file.
- Drag the .jar file into your mods folder in your Minecraft install folder, if not there create a folder named "mods".

I created the log cabin mod 7 years ago because I was unimpressed with the look of Minecraft cabins with the default square logs.
